name: autoplayur
description: AutoPlayUr is a Chrome Extension designed to automate and enhance your experience on [royalur.net](https://royalur.net/), the home of the Royal Game of Ur.

scripts.copy-assets: powershell -NoProfile -Command "if (!(Test-Path dist)) { New-Item -ItemType Directory dist }; Copy-Item src/manifest.json dist/; Copy-Item src/image.png dist/"
scripts.build: npm run clean && tsc && npm run copy-assets
